title: Metals gain as supply side issues re-emerge
section_path: Metals gain as supply side issues re-emerge
section_path_text: Metals gain as supply side issues re-emerge
summary:
Main
Lower-than-expected consumer inflation sparked a risk-on tone across markets. Supply side issues in metal markets pushed that sector higher. By Daniel Hynes
Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2025-03-13 102558.png | assets/2025-03-13_metals-gain-as-supply-side-issues-re-emerge_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_eec36d8baad3.png

Market Commentary
Crude oil rallied as bullish economic data triggered a risk-on tone across markets.

children.title: Main
children.summary: Lower-than-expected consumer inflation sparked a risk-on tone across markets. Supply side issues in metal markets pushed that sector higher.

children.title: Market Commentary
children.summary: Crude oil rallied as bullish economic data triggered a risk-on tone across markets. US consumer prices rose at their lowest pace in four months, easing concerns of stagflation.

children.title: Chart of the Day
children.summary:
Inventories of zinc in LME warehouses are falling sharply due to supply tightness in the concentrate market. Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2025-03-13 102715.png | assets/2025-03-13_metals-gain-as-supply-side-issues-re-emerge_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_019eeeb1987f.png
Data source: Commodities Wrap
